page_title: Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance - Complete Records - Setting Material Edition
text:
is an artbook for the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance created by khara inc.. It was published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 26 July 2019 for the original price of 3,300 yen + tax. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4905033209 

Overview

An artbook with the visual story of the Evangelion: 2.22 You Can (Not) Advance film. The cover is illustrated by Hidenori Matsubara.

Contents

Setting materials collection
Artboard collection
Publicity material collection
Final script draft
Illustration poster by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto

Staff interviews included in the hardcover version are not included.

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4905033209
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4905033202
